series_metadata.series_title: Safe At Home Absentee Identification Envelope Supplement
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes, but is not limited to, the Absent Voter’s Ballot Identification Envelope Supplement and any related materials.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain ninety (90) days after an election, or twenty-two (22) months after a federal election, then may destroy, provided no pending court action or order. ; Electronic: Retain ninety (90) days after an election, or twenty-two (22) months after a federal election, then may destroy, provided no pending court action or order., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
